r4subui 0.1.0
  • Reference

Create a Summary Value Box

Source: R/utils_render.R
r4sub_value_box.Rd

Creates a styled value box for displaying a single metric.

Usage

r4sub_value_box(title, value, theme = "primary", subtitle = NULL)

Arguments

title

Character label.

value

The value to display.

theme

Character theme: "primary", "success", "warning", "danger", "info". Default "primary".

subtitle

Optional subtitle text.

Value

A bslib::value_box element.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
r4sub_value_box("SCI Score", 85.2, theme = "success")
} # }
